boundary_binding.action_boundary: May HR or payroll execute the requested workforce, pay, benefits, or employment-status action? Focus: benefits enrollment after closed life-event window.

final_answer: The source control record does not close the exact benefits-enrollment boundary. It explicitly leaves the life-event window, dependent record, and coverage class match unresolved, and policy says communication tone cannot override source-control records.
